features.cns_function_analogy: action selection constrained by inhibitory control
features.failure_mode: high-risk or unclear request executes without inhibition or human gate
features.operational_function: route requests by excitation/inhibition weights before execution

features.cns_function_analogy: prioritize high-risk, high-evidence, high-uncertainty signals for control routing
features.failure_mode: dramatic request language increases autonomy despite missing evidence
features.operational_function: promote risk/evidence/failure signals over decorative language or emotional intensity

features.cns_function_analogy: limited active context under executive control
features.failure_mode: context expands without changing executable action
features.operational_function: compress every task into intent contract, execution graph, artifact and gates
features.repository_mechanism: AOS response contract + eval score schema

features.failure_mode: repository reports PASS while a required gate is absent or stale
features.operational_function: detect unsupported claims, fake readiness, missing validators and contract drift

features.cns_function_analogy: backward constraint from desired state to required evidence
features.failure_mode: system chooses next action by confidence instead of missing evidence
features.operational_function: derive missing actions from target status GREEN/YELLOW/BLOCKED

features.cns_function_analogy: maintain control variables inside safe operating range
features.failure_mode: automation escalates until complexity and risk overpower verification
features.operational_function: keep excitation/inhibition within target ranges and recompute after evidence changes

features.cns_function_analogy: same control constraints repeated across planning scales
features.failure_mode: local component passes while release-level invariant is broken
features.operational_function: repeat input/output/failure/evidence/human-gate checks at intent, boundary, contract, verification and release levels

features.cns_function_analogy: update policy only from error feedback
features.failure_mode: prompt grows impressive words without measured decision improvement
features.operational_function: allow prompt/kernel/task changes only when measured eval score improves without regression

forbidden_claims: The system must not be called a brain.
The system must not detect lies, guilt, diagnosis, or intent.
No neurocognitive label is valid without an operational validator.
GREEN status must not be inferred without executed evidence.
name: BIVE Neurocognitive Operational Feature Map
purpose: Map CNS-inspired control functions to executable repository mechanisms without biological identity claims.
